project: Base Note — Checkout, Client Portal, Subscription Reminders & Churn Reduction
author: Product Manager & Product Designer (UX/UI)
description: Comprehensive JSON instructions for building the Base Note checkout flow, client portal with fragrance history, 7-day pre-shipment engagement emails, auto-pilot rotation system, and multi-step cancellation/retention flow designed to reduce churn.

brand_context.tagline: Everyone deserves access to the world's most extraordinary fragrances
brand_context.catalog_type: Exclusive in-house fragrances only (Base Note Atelier)

shipping.recurring_orders: Ships on the 1st of each month

module_1_checkout_flow.description: Complete checkout experience where any purchase automatically enrolls the user in a monthly subscription. The checkout must clearly disclose the recurring billing commitment.
module_1_checkout_flow.critical_business_rule: EVERY PURCHASE = AUTOMATIC SUBSCRIPTION OPT-IN. The user is subscribing to a monthly plan by completing checkout. This must be clearly disclosed per FTC guidelines.

step_1_cart_review.trigger: User clicks 'Add to Cart' or 'Subscribe' from any product or plan selector

selected_plan.renewal_disclosure: Your subscription renews automatically. You can cancel, skip, or swap anytime from your account.

plan_selector_inline.note: Allow user to switch plans without leaving cart
plan_selector_inline.style: horizontal card selector, gold border on selected

items.text: Free travel case with quarterly & annual

cta.label: PROCEED TO CHECKOUT
cta.style: full-width, bg: primary_dark, color: white, padding: 16px, uppercase, letter-spacing

step_2_checkout_form.note: Shopify native checkout with customizations via Shopify Functions or checkout extensibility

fields.label: Email me with news, exclusive offers, and fragrance recommendations
fields.compliance_note: Pre-checked permitted under CAN-SPAM (US). For GDPR (EU) users, must be unchecked by default.

account_prompt.logged_in: Logged in as {email}. Not you? Log out.
account_prompt.logged_out: Already have an account? Log in

save_address_checkbox.label: Save this information for next time

section_3_payment.heading: Payment
section_3_payment.subheading: All transactions are secure and encrypted.

section_4_subscription_disclosure.position: ABOVE the Place Order button — MUST be visible without scrolling

content.heading: Subscription Terms
content.body_html: By completing this purchase, you are subscribing to a {plan_name} plan at {price}/{cycle}. Your subscription will automatically renew and your payment method will be charged on {next_billing_date}. You may cancel, skip a month, or swap your fragrance at any time from your account dashboard.

checkbox.label: I understand this is a recurring subscription and agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

content.style: background: #fef9e7 (soft amber), border: 1px solid #f39c12, padding: 16px, border-radius: 4px

section_4_subscription_disclosure.ftc_compliance_note: FTC requires clear and conspicuous disclosure of material terms for negative option (auto-renewal) subscriptions. This includes: the fact that charges are recurring, the amount, the frequency, and how to cancel.

submit_button.label: SUBSCRIBE & PAY ${total}
submit_button.style: full-width, bg: primary_dark, color: white, padding: 18px, font-size: 1.1rem, uppercase
submit_button.disabled_until: all required fields valid AND subscription_terms_agreement checked
submit_button.action: POST to Shopify checkout → create subscription via Recharge API → redirect to confirmation

plan_badge.style: bg: gold_accent, color: white, small badge

content.guarantee: 30-day satisfaction guarantee. Not happy? We'll make it right.

what_happens_next.text: Your first 5ml atomizer of {fragrance_name} ships within 1-2 business days.
You'll receive a tracking email once it's on its way.
7 days before your next shipment, we'll email you to confirm or swap your fragrance.
Manage everything from your account dashboard anytime.

content.subject: Welcome to Base Note — Your first fragrance is on its way!
body_includes: Selected fragrance details with notes pyramid
Subscription plan details with next billing date

module_2_client_portal.description: Customer account dashboard where subscribers manage their subscription, view fragrance history, select upcoming fragrances, and access account settings. HQ staff manage fragrance assignments via Shopify admin.

customer_dashboard.layout: left sidebar navigation + main content area

welcome_banner.sub_text: Member since {join_date} — {months_subscribed} months of fragrance discovery

items.text: You selected Midnight Oud for February

fragrance_history.heading: Your Fragrance Journey
fragrance_history.subheading: Every scent you've discovered with Base Note
fragrance_history.data_source: Shopify order metafields populated by HQ staff from Shopify admin

user_notes.placeholder: Add your personal notes about this scent...

empty_state.heading: Your journey starts soon!
empty_state.body: Once your first fragrance arrives, you'll see your complete scent journey here.

status_states.display: We've selected {fragrance_name} for you based on your preferences.
Choose your fragrance for {month}! Selection closes on {deadline}.
You've skipped {month}. No charge and no shipment.

fragrance_selector.trigger: Click 'Swap Fragrance', 'Choose a different fragrance', or 'Browse & select'
fragrance_selector.layout: modal or full-page grid of all 10 fragrances

card_content.name: fragrance name
card_content.user_rating: Your rating: X stars (if previously rated)

recommendation_section.heading: Recommended for you
recommendation_section.logic: Based on quiz results + rating history + not yet tried

sections.heading: Subscription Actions

actions.label: Cancel subscription
actions.style: text link, color: error_red, small font

sections.cancel_note: Cancel link intentionally de-emphasized (small, text-only, bottom) — not hidden but not prominent. This is standard for subscription retention UX.

hq_staff_portal.description: Shopify admin interface where HQ/merchant staff enter fragrance assignment details for each subscriber's monthly shipment

staff_workflow.tool: Recharge admin panel or Shopify Orders filtered by subscription tag
staff_workflow.details: See list of all active subscribers and their selected/auto-assigned fragrance for the month

staff_workflow.tool: Shopify Order metafield or Recharge order properties

staff_workflow.note: Customer metafield stores JSON array of all fragrance history entries. Each entry populates the client portal timeline.

auto_pilot_rotation_logic.description: When a subscriber does NOT select a fragrance by the deadline (24th of each month), the system auto-assigns one based on this priority order:

priority_rules.rule: Fragrance from user's quiz-matched profile that they haven't tried yet
Highest-rated fragrance by the community that user hasn't tried
Fragrance from a different scent family than their last 2 shipments (variety)

auto_pilot_rotation_logic.constraint: NEVER send the same fragrance the user received in the last 3 months
auto_pilot_rotation_logic.staff_override: HQ staff can manually override auto-pilot selection at any time before shipment

module_3_subscription_reminders.description: Email engagement system that sends a reminder 7 days before the next shipment, allowing users to confirm, swap, or skip their upcoming fragrance. If no action is taken, auto-pilot selects for them.

email_1_seven_days_before.trigger: 7 days before scheduled shipment (e.g., if shipping on Feb 1, send on Jan 25)
email_1_seven_days_before.audience: Active subscribers only (not paused, not cancelled)
subject_lines: Your February fragrance is ready — confirm or swap?
{first_name}, your next scent ships in 7 days
Sneak peek: Here's what's coming in your Base Note box

scenario_A_user_already_selected.condition: User has already selected a fragrance for this month
scenario_A_user_already_selected.heading: You're all set, {first_name}!

scenario_B_auto_pilot_assigned.condition: User has NOT selected; system has auto-assigned based on rotation logic
scenario_B_auto_pilot_assigned.heading: We picked something special for you, {first_name}
scenario_B_auto_pilot_assigned.body: Based on your scent profile, we've selected {fragrance_name} for {month}. Love it? Do nothing and it'll ship on {ship_date}. Want something different? You have 7 days to swap.

why_we_chose.text: Why we chose this: {reason — e.g., 'Based on your love for Midnight Oud, we think you'll enjoy another woody scent with a twist of amber.'}

scenario_C_no_selection.condition: User has NOT selected and auto-pilot has NOT yet assigned (early notification window)
scenario_C_no_selection.heading: Choose your {month} fragrance, {first_name}!
scenario_C_no_selection.body: Your next fragrance ships in 7 days. Browse our collection and pick the scent you want to discover this month. If you don't choose, we'll pick one for you based on your preferences.

library_preview.heading: Your library — 10 exclusive fragrances
library_preview.cards: 3 recommended fragrances based on quiz + history

cta_secondary.label: Surprise me — let Base Note pick

footer.help: Questions? Reply to this email or visit our FAQ
footer.unsubscribe: Unsubscribe from reminder emails (required by CAN-SPAM)
footer.address: Base Note Inc., 123 Fragrance Avenue, Suite 400, New York, NY 10013

email_2_three_days_before.trigger: 3 days before shipment AND user still has NOT confirmed/selected
email_2_three_days_before.audience: Subscribers who received Email 1 but took no action
subject_lines: Last chance to pick your fragrance, {first_name}!
Don't miss out: Your fragrance ships in 3 days

content.heading: Time's almost up!
content.body: Your {month} fragrance ships in 3 days. We've pre-selected {fragrance_name} for you. Confirm it, swap it, or skip — your call.
content.urgency_note: No action needed if you're happy with our pick — it'll ship automatically.

email_3_shipment_confirmation.trigger: Order ships (1st of the month or when tracking number generated)
email_3_shipment_confirmation.audience: All active subscribers who received a shipment
subject_lines: Your {month} fragrance is on its way!

content.heading: It's on its way!
content.fragrance_card: full fragrance details with notes pyramid
content.how_to_wear: Pro tip: Apply to pulse points — wrists, neck, and behind ears. Your 5ml atomizer gives you ~30 sprays, perfect for daily wear all month.
content.footer_cta: Already thinking about next month? Browse the library →

subject_lines: Quick question about your latest scent, {first_name}

content.heading: How's {fragrance_name}?
content.body: You've had a few days with your latest fragrance. We'd love to know what you think!

rating_cta.label: Rate this fragrance
rating_cta.format: 5 clickable star icons directly in email (link to /account/history#{fragrance_id}#rate)

content.testimonial_prompt: Love it? Share your thoughts and help others discover their next favorite scent.
content.cta_secondary: Already picking your next fragrance? Browse →
content.note: This email drives engagement metrics and provides data for auto-pilot algorithm improvement

timeline.email: Email 2: Urgency reminder (last chance to change)

email_timing_summary.selection_deadline: 24th of the month (7 days before 1st of next month)
email_timing_summary.auto_pilot_assignment: If no selection by 24th, system assigns auto-pilot fragrance on 25th
email_timing_summary.final_lock: Shipment locked on 28th — no changes after this date

module_4_cancellation_and_churn_reductio.description: Multi-step cancellation flow designed to understand why users leave, offer retention incentives, and reduce churn while remaining transparent and not manipulative.
module_4_cancellation_and_churn_reductio.critical_principle: Be transparent and respectful. Retention offers should feel like genuine value, not dark patterns. Always allow the user to cancel without excessive friction.

step_1_confirmation_gate.heading: We're sorry to see you go, {first_name}
step_1_confirmation_gate.body: Before you cancel, here's what you'll lose:

value_reminder.text: Access to 10 exclusive luxury fragrances at a fraction of retail

step_2_reason_survey.heading: Help us improve — why are you canceling?
step_2_reason_survey.subheading: Your feedback directly shapes our product. Please select the reason that best describes your experience.

reasons.label: I'm not using the fragrances fast enough
I haven't liked the fragrances I received
I've tried all the scents I wanted

optional_feedback_field.label: Anything else you'd like us to know?
optional_feedback_field.placeholder: Your feedback helps us create a better experience...

step_3_retention_offers.heading: Before you go — we have something for you
step_3_retention_offers.note: The offer shown depends on the reason selected in Step 2. Only ONE offer is presented (not multiple).

too_expensive.heading: How about 30% off your next 3 months?
too_expensive.body: We'd hate to lose you over price. Stay with Base Note and enjoy 30% off for the next 3 months — that's just ${discounted_price}/month for luxury fragrances worth up to $300.

not_using.heading: No rush — pause instead?
not_using.body: Life gets busy! Instead of canceling, you can pause your subscription for 1-2 months. No charges, and your account stays active so you can pick up right where you left off.
not_using.alternative: Or switch to quarterly billing ($48 every 3 months) for more time between shipments.

dont_like_scents.heading: Let us get it right — free personalized consultation
dont_like_scents.body: We're sorry the fragrances haven't been hitting the mark. Our scent curator would love to personally select your next 3 fragrances based on a quick chat about your preferences. Plus, your next month is on us.
perks: 1-on-1 scent consultation via email or phone
Personally curated selection for your next 3 months
Next month FREE as our apology

tried_enough.heading: Exciting news — new fragrances are coming!
tried_enough.body: We're expanding our collection! 3 new exclusive fragrances drop in {next_quarter}. Stay subscribed and be the first to try them — plus get priority access before they're available to new subscribers.

switching_competitor.heading: We appreciate your loyalty, {first_name}
switching_competitor.body: You've been with us for {months} months. Before you try somewhere else, here's our loyalty offer: 40% off your next 2 months. Plus, we'd love to know what the other service offers that we don't — so we can improve.
switching_competitor.feedback_prompt: What does the other service offer that we're missing?

feedback_field.placeholder: Help us compete for your love...

financial_reasons.heading: We understand — let's find a plan that fits
financial_reasons.body: Financial flexibility matters. Instead of canceling, consider our quarterly or annual plans that save you money:

shipping_issues.heading: We're on it — let us fix this
shipping_issues.body: Shipping issues shouldn't ruin your experience. Our support team will personally investigate your delivery problems. Plus, your next month is free while we sort things out.

other.heading: How about 25% off your next 2 months?
other.body: We value your membership. Stay for 2 more months at 25% off and see if things improve.

step_4_final_cancellation.condition: User clicked 'No thanks, continue canceling' in Step 3
step_4_final_cancellation.heading: Confirm cancellation
step_4_final_cancellation.body: Your subscription will be canceled at the end of your current billing period ({end_date}). You'll still receive your {current_month} fragrance and have access to your account until then.

summary.note: Your fragrance history and ratings will be saved if you decide to resubscribe.

final_cta_keep.label: Wait, I changed my mind — keep my subscription

confirmation_page.heading: Your subscription has been canceled
confirmation_page.body: We're sad to see you go, {first_name}. Your account remains active until {end_date} and your fragrance history is saved.

confirmation_email.subject: Your Base Note subscription has been canceled

includes: What they'll still have access to until end date
How to resubscribe if they change their mind
Thank you for being a member

email_1.subject: We miss you, {first_name} — 25% off if you come back

email_3.subject: Your scent journey doesn't have to end

win_back_email_sequence.cap: Max 3 win-back emails. Stop if user resubscribes or unsubscribes from marketing.

churn_data_collection.description: All cancellation reasons and feedback are logged for product improvement and churn analysis
analytics_dashboard_metrics: Retention offer acceptance rate by offer type
Correlation between fragrance ratings and churn

sales_tax_configuration.description: Sales tax calculated based on shipping address per US law (45/50 states). Shopify handles this automatically.
sales_tax_configuration.action: Verify tax enabled in Shopify Admin > Settings > Taxes
sales_tax_configuration.note: Do NOT use billing address for tax calculation on physical goods

single_item_cart_enforcement.description: Cart can hold maximum 1 subscription item. Additional fragrances go to Rotation List.
single_item_cart_enforcement.behavior: If subscription item exists in cart when adding another, prompt user to swap
single_item_cart_enforcement.storage: Rotation list stored in localStorage key 'basenotes_queue'

free_shipping_configuration.rule: Configure actual $0 shipping rate in Shopify Admin
free_shipping_configuration.note: Theme UI displays FREE but actual rate must exist in Shopify shipping settings
